## Aliyun ROS MSE Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as MSE from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-mse';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.Clusters

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.Clusters.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.Clusters.attr_cluster_ids
documentation: Attribute ClusterIds: The list of cluster IDs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.Clusters.attr_clusters
documentation: Attribute Clusters: The list of clusters.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::MSE::Clusters`, which is used to query Microservices Registry clusters.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosClusters\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-mse-clusters>

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.ClustersProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Clusters`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-mse-clusters>

```
param cluster_alias_name

Property clusterAliasName: The alias name of cluster.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.ClustersProps.cluster_alias_name
documentation: Property clusterAliasName: The alias name of cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.ClustersProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.datasource.RosClusters.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::MSE::Clusters`, which is used to query Microservices Registry clusters.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Clusters` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-mse-clusters>

modules.name: ros_cdk_mse
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS MSE Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as MSE from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-mse';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_acl_entry_list
documentation: Attribute AclEntryList: The public network whitelist list is used only when the public network is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_cluster_specification
documentation:
Attribute ClusterSpecification: Cluster specifications.

Note the msversion requirements of the version parameter,
Optional parameters:
"MSE_ SC *1_2_60_c",
"MSE* SC *2_4_60_c",
"MSE* SC *4_8_60_c",
"MSE* SC *8_16_60_c",
"MSE* SC _16_32_60_c"

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_cluster_version
documentation: Attribute ClusterVersion: Cluster version, such as ZooKeeper_3_8_0,NACOS_2_0_0.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_config_auth_enabled
documentation:
Attribute ConfigAuthEnabled: Whether the configuration supports it.

Valid values: true: false: not supported

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_config_secret_enabled
documentation:
Attribute ConfigSecretEnabled: Whether the configuration password takes effect.

The value is as follows: true: valid false: not valid

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_disk_capacity
documentation: Attribute DiskCapacity: disk capacity, unit: G.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_mcp_enabled
documentation: Attribute MCPEnabled: Whether MCP takes effect, the value is as follows: true: valid false: not valid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_mse_version
documentation:
Attribute MseVersion: Required, the value is as follows:.

-'mse_dev': indicates the development version.
-'Mse_pro': means professional version. When this version is selected, the specification is 2c4g or above, and the specification is 3 nodes or above.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_net_type
documentation:
Attribute NetType: Network type (whether private network is enabled or not).

privatenet indicates that private network is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.Cluster.attr_pub_network_flow
documentation:
Attribute PubNetworkFlow: Public network bandwidth.

If the bandwidth is greater than 0, the public network is enabled.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MSE::Cluster`, which is used to create a cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosCluster\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mse-cluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ClusterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Cluster`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mse-cluster>

```
param cluster_specification

Property clusterSpecification: Cluster specifications. Note the msversion requirements of the version parameter, Optional parameters: "MSE SC 1_2_60_c", "MSE SC 2_4_60_c", "MSE SC 4_8_60_c", "MSE SC 8_16_60_c", "MSE SC _16_32_60_c"

param cluster_type

Property clusterType: cluster type.

param cluster_version

Property clusterVersion: Cluster version, such as ZooKeeper_3_8_0,NACOS_2_0_0.

param instance_count

Property instanceCount: instance count.

param net_type

Property netType: Network type (whether private network is enabled or not). privatenet indicates that private network is enabled.

param accept_language

Property acceptLanguage:.

param acl_entry_list

Property aclEntryList: The public network whitelist list is used only when the public network is enabled.

param cluster_alias_name

Property clusterAliasName: cluster alias name.

param connection_type

Property connectionType: network connect type.

param disk_type

Property diskType: disk type.

param mse_version

Property mseVersion: Required, the value is as follows:. -'mse_dev': indicates the development version. -'Mse_pro': means professional version. When this version is selected, the specification is 2c4g or above, and the specification is 3 nodes or above.

param private_slb_specification

Property privateSlbSpecification:.

param pub_network_flow

Property pubNetworkFlow: Public network bandwidth. If the bandwidth is greater than 0, the public network is enabled.

param pub_slb_specification

Property pubSlbSpecification:.

param request_pars

Property requestPars:.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: vpc id.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: switcher Id.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ClusterProps.cluster_specification
documentation:
Property clusterSpecification: Cluster specifications.

Note the msversion requirements of the version parameter,
Optional parameters:
"MSE_ SC *1_2_60_c",
"MSE* SC *2_4_60_c",
"MSE* SC *4_8_60_c",
"MSE* SC *8_16_60_c",
"MSE* SC _16_32_60_c"

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ClusterProps.cluster_version
documentation: Property clusterVersion: Cluster version, such as ZooKeeper_3_8_0,NACOS_2_0_0.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ClusterProps.net_type
documentation:
Property netType: Network type (whether private network is enabled or not).

privatenet indicates that private network is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ClusterProps.acl_entry_list
documentation: Property aclEntryList: The public network whitelist list is used only when the public network is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ClusterProps.mse_version
documentation:
Property mseVersion: Required, the value is as follows:.

-'mse_dev': indicates the development version.
-'Mse_pro': means professional version. When this version is selected, the specification is 2c4g or above, and the specification is 3 nodes or above.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ClusterProps.pub_network_flow
documentation:
Property pubNetworkFlow: Public network bandwidth.

If the bandwidth is greater than 0, the public network is enabled.

documentation:
:Property:

clusterSpecification: Cluster specifications. Note the msversion requirements of the version parameter,
Optional parameters:
"MSE_ SC *1_2_60_c",
"MSE* SC *2_4_60_c",
"MSE* SC *4_8_60_c",
"MSE* SC *8_16_60_c",
"MSE* SC _16_32_60_c"

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosCluster.cluster_version
documentation: :Property: clusterVersion: Cluster version, such as ZooKeeper_3_8_0,NACOS_2_0_0

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosCluster.net_type
documentation: :Property: netType: Network type (whether private network is enabled or not). privatenet indicates that private network is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosCluster.acl_entry_list
documentation: :Property: aclEntryList: The public network whitelist list is used only when the public network is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosCluster.mse_version
documentation:
:Property:

mseVersion: Required, the value is as follows:

-'mse_dev': indicates the development version.
-'Mse_pro': means professional version. When this version is selected, the specification is 2c4g or above, and the specification is 3 nodes or above.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosCluster.pub_network_flow
documentation: :Property: pubNetworkFlow: Public network bandwidth. If the bandwidth is greater than 0, the public network is enabled.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MSE::Cluster`, which is used to create a cluster.


This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Cluster` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.

---

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.attr_address
documentation: :Attribute: Address: Registration Address. If not specified, it will be automatically generated based on the selected instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.attr_gateway_unique_id
documentation: :Attribute: GatewayUniqueId: The unique ID of the gateway.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.attr_id
documentation: :Attribute: Id: The ID of service source.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.attr_name
documentation:
:Attribute:

Name: The name.
If Type is set to K8S, this parameter specifies the name of the ACK cluster.
If Type is set to NACOS, this parameter specifies the ID of the Nacos instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.gateway_unique_id
documentation: :Property: gatewayUniqueId: The unique ID of the gateway.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.name
documentation:
:Property:

name: The name.
If Source=K8S, this parameter specifies the name of the ACK cluster.
If Source=MSE, this parameter specifies the ID of the Nacos instance.
If Source=MSE_ZK, this parameter specifies the ID of the ZooKeeper instance.
If Source=EDAS, this parameter specifies the ID of the EDAS namespace.
If Source=SAE, this parameter specifies the ID of the SAE namespace.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.source
documentation:
:Property:

source: The service source. Valid values:
K8S: ACK cluster
MSE: MSE Nacos instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.address
documentation: :Property: address: Registration Address. If not specified, it will be automatically generated based on the selected instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.group_list
documentation: :Property: groupList: The list of service groups. This is required when Source=EDAS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.path_list
documentation: :Property: pathList: An array of service root paths.

param enable_status: true

documentation: :Property: ingressClass: Specifies whether to monitor Ingress classes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.RosServiceSource.IngressOptionsProperty.watch_namespace
documentation: :Property: watchNamespace: The namespace whose resources you want to monitor.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MSE::ServiceSource`, which is used to create a Nacos service source.

```
Note
```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosServiceSource\`\`for a more convenient development experience.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mse.ServiceSourceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `ServiceSource`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mse-servicesource>

```
param gateway_unique_id

Property gatewayUniqueId: The unique ID of the gateway.

param name

Property name: The name. If Source=K8S, this parameter specifies the name of the ACK cluster. If Source=MSE, this parameter specifies the ID of the Nacos instance. If Source=MSE_ZK, this parameter specifies the ID of the ZooKeeper instance. If Source=EDAS, this parameter specifies the ID of the EDAS namespace. If Source=SAE, this parameter specifies the ID of the SAE namespace.

param source

Property source: The service source. Valid values: K8S: ACK cluster MSE: MSE Nacos instance

param address

Property address: Registration Address. If not specified, it will be automatically generated based on the selected instance.

param group_list

Property groupList: The list of service groups. This is required when Source=EDAS.

param ingress_options

Property ingressOptions: The Ingress configuration.

param path_list

Property pathList: An array of service root paths.
```
